overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade in Night City. The player character moves from an open palm-lined walkway into a shadowed underpass beneath an elevated highway, then emerges into a bright commercial district filled with neon billboards and pedestrians.

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the elevated highway structure ahead
slight rightward curve in the walkway as it approaches the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, passing palm trees and approaching the shadow of an elevated highway

entered.detail: large concrete and metal elevated highway spanning across the water
tall palm tree with green fronds lining the walkway
metal railing separating the walkway from the water below
distinctive orange paved pedestrian path with geometric patterns
modern high-rise buildings with glass and steel facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront promenade with distinctive orange paving. The camera moves forward past palm trees toward an elevated highway structure that casts growing shadows. The walkway curves slightly right as it approaches the dark underpass, with futuristic buildings visible across the street to the left.

events.description: large concrete support pillar passes by on the right side
approaching the bright exit at the end of the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark underpass beneath the elevated highway, with street traffic visible to the left and trash scattered on the ground

entered.detail: dark concrete underside of the elevated highway with visible structural beams
massive teal-colored concrete pillar supporting the highway above
multi-lane road with moving traffic running parallel to the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, enclosed space beneath the elevated highway. The camera moves through deep shadow with the concrete deck overhead and massive support pillars passing by on the right. Street traffic is visible through the darkness to the left, and the ground shows scattered debris. Bright daylight is visible ahead at the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial waterfront street with digital advertising

events.description: exiting the underpass into bright sunlight and commercial district
crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians appearing on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a bustling commercial district, passing pedestrians and viewing large digital billboards and neon signage

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction, wearing casual clothing
crossing the walkway from left to right in front of the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying product commercials
bright neon signs and holographic displays on building facades
multi-story commercial structures with storefronts and advertising

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a vibrant commercial district. The camera walks along the waterfront passing other pedestrians, with large digital billboards and neon signs covering the buildings to the left. The elevated highway continues to the right but is now in the distance, while the orange walkway leads toward a busy intersection with more palm trees and towering skyscrapers ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny waterfront promenade through a shadowed underpass and into a vibrant commercial district. It begins on an orange-paved walkway, moving past palm trees toward the looming structure of an elevated highway that casts growing shadows across the path. As the camera enters the dark, enclosed space beneath the highway, the bright daylight fades into deep shadow defined by massive concrete support pillars and scattered debris. The scene then opens as the camera emerges from the tunnel back into brilliant sunlight, where the environment shifts into a bustling urban hub filled with pedestrians and towering digital billboards. Finally, the path leads toward a busy intersection of skyscrapers and palm trees, leaving the highway structure behind in the distance.
